stemHtml: A category II operation (CAT II) is an instrument precision approach and landing using ILS or MLS with:

options.a: a DH below 50 ft and a RVR of less than 200 m but not less than 75 m.
options.b: a DH below 100 ft but not lower than 50 ft and a RVR of not less than 250 m.
options.c: a DH below 100 ft but not lower than 50 ft and a RVR of not less than 200 m.
options.d: a DH below 200 ft but not lower than 100 ft and a RVR of not less than 300 m.
